pages.title: Pricing
pages.markdown:
# Pricing

Northstar prices by active accounts, intent signal volume, and rep seats so revenue teams can start with a lean pilot and expand as coverage grows.

pages.title: Product
pages.markdown:
# Product

The workspace combines ICP filters, stakeholder timelines, and recommended talking points into one shared account view for every seller.

pages.title: Customers
pages.markdown:
# Customers

Revenue teams use Northstar to cut research time before discovery calls and keep qualification notes current across the pod.

pages.title: Careers
pages.markdown:
# Careers

Northstar is hiring account executives and solutions consultants to support enterprise expansion and more complex multi-team buying cycles.

pages.title: Platform Overview
pages.markdown:
# Platform Overview

Northstar helps revenue teams qualify product-led accounts with better account context before every live conversation.
